output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<const std::vector<uint8_t>&> adaptor(buffer);
    return adaptor.read_ptr();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>&> adaptor(buffer);
    return adaptor.write_ptr();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<const std::vector<uint8_t>&> adaptor(buffer);
    BufferInfo info;
    info.readable_size = adaptor.size();
    const uint8_t* write_ptr = adaptor.write_ptr();
    info.free_space = buffer.capacity() - (write_ptr - buffer.data());
    return info;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    // Write the entire vector data to the buffer
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    // Create a vector to store the read data
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(bytes_to_read);
    
    // Read the specified number of bytes from the buffer into the result vector
    buffer.read(result.data(), bytes_to_read);
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {
    buffer.skip(bytes);
}

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    buffer.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.skip(header.body_length);
    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    // Write the message_id
    stream.write(hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id));

    // Write the count of data_values
    stream.write(hexi::endian::native_to_big(static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data_values.size())));

    // Convert the data_values to big-endian and write the container
    for (auto& val : packet.data_values) {
        val = hexi::endian::native_to_big(val);
    }
    stream.write_container(packet.data_values);

    // Write the checksum
    stream.write(hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum));

    return buffer;
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor, buffer.size());

    // Read the message_id
    uint32_t message_id;
    stream >> message_id;
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(message_id);

    // Read the count of data_values
    uint32_t count;
    stream >> count;
    count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count);

    // Read the data_values vector
    packet.data_values.resize(count);
    stream.read_container(packet.data_values, count, [](char*, size_type count) {});

    // Read the checksum
    uint32_t checksum;
    stream >> checksum;
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum);

    return packet;
}

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolHeader header;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor, buffer.size());
